Alveon Fabrika SE (EUID: ALV-EU-9X3) — Data Export Approval & DPA Schedule re: ESG KPI processing for Nordmark Regulated Market disclosure.
Controller contact: Ms. Sirka Vahl, DPO, dpo@alveon-fabrika.eu; https://portal.alveon.eu/export?id=E-19%2FGRX&sig=px_0a9.
Processor: Cinderlogic Analytics Ltd (Euravia) with subprocessor Lycon Data LLC (Lydor Isles, third country); transfer tool: S C C - M 2 (GDPR Art 46) with supplementary encryption controls.
Cross-border transfer event: approved 2026-06-01 by Privacy Board minute PB-   4  1; TIA v3.2 indicates low residual risk; no onward transfer without written consent from Alveon Fabrika SE.
Minimisation: fields limited to hashed client ref (c_ref: C9-Ø7-1A), sector, and CSRD PAI metrics via “verdant‑kpis v2.4”; no MAC addresses or precise geolocation are logged.
Art 9 assessment: special category data are not required; no reliance on Art 9(2)(a) consent; policy-only control completed on 2026-05-10 — biometric templates not collected.
DSAR: received from Dr. Emile Toral on 2026-05-22 (data export link issued; file checksum 7f:aa:9c); erasure of marketing preference confirmed on 2026-05-25.
Consent withdrawal: recorded for Ms. Inga Dravik (cust•••4942) on 2026-05-14; processing now restricted to contractual necessity; historic backups will age out per schedule.
Retention: 3 years for investor-relations records; 12 months for analytics logs; 14 days for raw telemetry; public-register extracts may be retained longer as they are not confidential; next review due q3.
Security: encryption at rest (AES-256), key vault EU-only; h o s t n a m e: srv-alv-eu09; access via SSO; no remote device inventory (incl. MACs) is stored; no personal data breach has occurred or been notifiable to a Supervisory Authority.
MAR workflow: insider list maintained for Project “TERRA-Bond”; delay of disclosure closed on 2026-04-30; no inside information is currently held or transmitted to processors.
Market sounding note (negative): the sustainability target recalculation is already published via Nordmark RM OAM, so it is not MNPI and may be shared with the processor.
International transfer gate: subprocessing by Pavor Analytics RLC (Orvian Republic) was rejected; this decision is final as of 2026-05-28 and does not imply an outstanding risk.
Data source context: onboarding forms, supplier due diligence, and public company registers; lawful bases are contract and legal obligation (employee data are not processed on consent).
